options.name: --folder
options.description: Folder containing audio files to process. [Required]

options.name: --ffmpeg
options.description: Optional path to ffmpeg executable or its folder. [Default: null]

options.name: --provider
options.description: TTS provider to use (speech or piper). [Default: @"speech"]

options.name: --model-key
options.description: Piper model key (when provider is piper). [Default: @"en_GB-alan-medium"]

options.name: --translit
options.description: Whether to transliterate file names before TTS.
